records.question: Which customers living in Sauerberg, Hawaii exactly at 039 Jedidiah Estate Suite 537, Apt. 245 have complaints with an outcome code of OK raised on or after 1987-07-11 14:40:30?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN complaints ON customers.customer_id = complaints.customer_id
WHERE customers.address_line_1 = '039 Jedidiah Estate Suite 537' AND complaints.complaint_outcome_code = 'OK' AND complaints.date_complaint_raised >= '1987-07-11 14:40:30' AND customers.state = 'Hawaii' AND customers.address_line_2 = 'Apt. 245' AND customers.town_city = 'Sauerberg'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Customers.customer_id 
FROM Customers 
JOIN Complaints ON Customers.customer_id = Complaints.customer_id 
WHERE Customers.town_city = 'Sauerberg' 
AND Customers.state = 'Hawaii' 
AND Customers.address_line_1 = '039 Jedidiah Estate Suite 537, Apt. 245' 
AND Complaints.complaint_outcome_code = 'OK' 
AND Complaints.date_complaint_raised >= '1987-07-11 14:40:30'

records.question: Which customers with a Good Credit Rating raised a Product Unusable complaint on 1973-02-10 22:55:56 about products priced at least 35.0?

SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN complaints ON customers.customer_id = complaints.customer_id
JOIN products ON complaints.product_id = products.product_id
WHERE customers.customer_type_code = 'Good Credit Rating' AND complaints.complaint_type_code = 'Product Unusable' AND complaints.date_complaint_raised = '1973-02-10 22:55:56' AND products.product_price >= 35.0
records.pred_sql:

FROM Customers 
JOIN Complaints ON Customers.customer_id = Complaints.customer_id 
JOIN Products ON Complaints.product_id = Products.product_id

AND Complaints.complaint_type_code = 'Product Unusable'

AND Products.product_price >= 35.0

records.question: Who are the customers with open complaints about products priced at most 2.88?

WHERE complaints.complaint_status_code = 'Open' AND products.product_price <= 2.88

records.question: Who are the customers with a Good Credit Rating, living at 1566 Ramona Overpass Apt. 464 and Suite 151, whose email is ubeier@example.org, phone number is 044-468-4549, who had complaints raised on or before 2002-07-18 10:59:35 handled by male staff?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN complaints ON customers.customer_id = complaints.customer_id
JOIN staff ON complaints.staff_id = staff.staff_id
WHERE customers.address_line_2 = 'Suite 151' AND customers.email_address = 'ubeier@example.org' AND customers.customer_type_code = 'Good Credit Rating' AND complaints.date_complaint_raised <= '2002-07-18 10:59:35' AND customers.address_line_1 = '1566 Ramona Overpass Apt. 464' AND customers.phone_number = '044-468-4549' AND staff.gender = '0'

FROM Customers 
JOIN Complaints ON Customers.customer_id = Complaints.customer_id 
JOIN Staff ON Complaints.staff_id = Staff.staff_id 
WHERE Customers.customer_type_code = 'Good Credit Rating' 
AND (Customers.address_line_1 = '1566 Ramona Overpass Apt. 464' OR Customers.address_line_2 = 'Suite 151') 
AND Customers.email_address = 'ubeier@example.org' 
AND Customers.phone_number = '044-468-4549' 
AND Complaints.date_complaint_raised <= '2002-07-18 10:59:35'
